title: Man allegedly rapes Buisplaas woman
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A 22-year-old Buisplaas woman has opened a case of rape with the KwaNonqaba Police Station after an incident yesterday afternoon, 14 September.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A 22-year-old Buisplaas woman has opened a case of rape with the KwaNonqaba Police Station after an incident yesterday afternoon, 14 September."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The station’s spokesperson, Warrant Officer Kappie Kapp, said the suspect is allegedly known to the victim."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to the victim’s statement to the police, the suspect had called her to his home in Buisplaas just after 13:00 on Sunday. She alleged that once she arrived, he grabbed her by the arms and raped her.","html":"According to the victim’s statement to the police, the suspect had called her to his home in Buisplaas just after 13:00 on Sunday. She alleged that once she arrived, he grabbed her by the arms and raped her."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It is alleged that when she kicked and screamed, the suspect sprayed something towards her genitals. It is unclear at this stage what he used.","html":"It is alleged that when she kicked and screamed, the suspect sprayed something towards her genitals. It is unclear at this stage what he used."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Kapp said the case is under investigation and has been handed over to the Mossel Bay Family Violence, Child Protection and Sexual Offences Unit. No arrests have yet been made.","html":"Kapp said the case is under investigation and has been handed over to the Mossel Bay Family Violence, Child Protection and Sexual Offences Unit. No arrests have yet been made."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
